query:
SELECT 
  t.nome as trilha,
  t.totalSessoes as sessoes_previstas,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ms.alunoId) as alunos,
  ROUND(AVG(sub.total_sessoes), 1) as media_sessoes_realizadas
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
JOIN trilhas t ON ms.trilhaId = t.id
JOIN (
  SELECT alunoId, trilhaId, COUNT(*) as total_sessoes 
  FROM mentoring_sessions 
  GROUP BY alunoId, trilhaId
) sub ON sub.alunoId = ms.alunoId AND sub.trilhaId = ms.trilhaId
GROUP BY t.id, t.nome, t.totalSessoes
ORDER BY t.nome
